compiled_state.title: Document list-epics children_count semantics (total non-deleted children, not open)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
list-epics' 4th column / list_epics.schema.json children_count is the count of ALL non-deleted children (open + in_progress + closed + archived; only deleted tombstones excluded), NOT a count of open children. This is undocumented at every exposed surface, which misleads consumers into reading it as an open-child count.

## What
- src/rebar/schemas/list_epics.schema.json: add a description to children_count clarifying it is total non-deleted children, not open.
- src/rebar/_engine/ticket-list-epics.sh: expand the <child_count> column note in the header comment with the same clarification.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] children_count in list_epics.schema.json has a description stating it counts all non-deleted children and is NOT open-only
- [ ] ticket-list-epics.sh header documents the column's meaning unambiguously
- [ ] No behavior change (docs only)
